def product_matrix(grid):
    MOD = 12345
    n = len(grid)
    m = len(grid[0])
    
    # Flatten the grid for easier handling
    total_elements = n * m
    flat = [grid[i][j] for i in range(n) for j in range(m)]
    
    # Count zeros
    zero_count = sum(1 for val in flat if val % MOD == 0)
